content.question: What proportion of Hungary's documented segregation gap is specifically attributable to the 6/8-year gimnázium track mechanism versus church-school admissions autonomy, residential geography, or entrance-exam criteria?
content.reduction_path: Disaggregated student-flow analysis tracking cohorts by enrollment route (state 6/8/4-year track vs. church school vs. private) with matched socioeconomic background, controlling for settlement type and primary-school exam performance
